restaurant_openings.name: A Night at Boogies, Dallas’ Take on Studio 54
restaurant_openings.summary: Boogies, which sits in the former Whippersnapper space off Henderson at 1806 McMillan Ave comes by way of This And That Hospitality (Double D’s, High Fives) with the assistance of Take a Break founder, DJ Jake Gatewood. The venue has two faces. One is a sexy, low-lit cocktail bar with great sound and vinyl playlists, […]

restaurant_openings.name: The Second Netflix House in America is Open at the Galleria
restaurant_openings.summary: The second Netflix House in the United States is officially open at Galleria Dallas at 13550 North Dallas Parkway and its entrance boasts a huge neon-lit red envelope — a nod to the streamer’s roots as a DVD-by-mail rental service. Admission at the entertainment venue is free, giving guests the chance to browse, snap photos, […]

restaurant_openings.name: French Bistro in Uptown Earns Michelin Star Two Months After Opening
restaurant_openings.summary: In one of the food world’s more shocking developments, a Dallas restaurant has earned a Michelin star after just two months in business. Mamani, led by executive chef and partner Christophe De Lellis, who spent more than a decade cooking at Joël Robuchon in Las Vegas, took home the coveted award at the second Texas […]
